expectations.text: Recommends `winml inspect` before kicking off the rest of the pipeline.
expectations.evidence: Never mentions winml CLI at all. Goes straight to optimum-cli + onnxruntime; no support check before downloading and quantizing.

expectations.text: Identifies QNN as the correct EP for Snapdragon X Elite.
expectations.evidence: 'ONNX Runtime with the QNN execution provider â€” that's what targets the Hexagon NPU on Snapdragon X.'

expectations.text: Does NOT recommend OpenVINO, VitisAI, or other non-Qualcomm EPs as the primary path.
Walks through the build pipeline (export/optimize/quantize/compile or config+build).
expectations.evidence: Walks through env setup -> export (optimum-cli) -> static quantize (QDQ) -> provider sanity check -> perf_test. Multi-stage.

expectations.text: Includes a benchmark step that produces latency numbers.

expectations.evidence: Uses real onnxruntime_perf_test flags; sources Quark/quantize APIs from actual ORT docs.
